member.name: T:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcode
member.summary: Provides static methods for creating PDF sections containing barcodes and for setting the license key required for barcode generation.
member.remarks: Use the methods in this class to add barcode elements to PDF documents by binding model properties and specifying barcode encoding options. The class supports customization of barcode size and allows integration with callback functions for generated barcodes. All methods are static and thread-safe. Setting the license key is required before generating barcodes if using a licensed version of IronBarCode.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcode.SetLicense(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the license key used to activate IronBarCode features.
member.remarks: Call this method before using any IronBarCode functionality that requires a valid license. Setting an invalid or expired license key may restrict access to premium features.
member.param: The license key string to apply. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcode.BarcodeSection``1(PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.String,``0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding)
member.summary: Creates a PDF section that displays a barcode generated from the specified data using the given encoding.
member.typeparam: The type of the PDF model associated with the section. Must implement IPdfModel.
member.param: A binding action that provides the string data to be encoded as a barcode in the PDF section.
The encoding format to use for generating the barcode.
member.returns: A PDF section that renders the barcode based on the provided data and encoding.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcode.BarcodeSection``1(PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.String,``0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding)
member.summary: Creates a PDF section that displays a barcode generated from the specified data using the given encoding.
member.typeparam: The model type that implements IPdfModel and provides context for the PDF section.
member.param: The bound property containing the string value to encode as a barcode in the PDF section.
The encoding format to use when generating the barcode from the provided data.
member.returns: A PDF section instance that renders the barcode based on the specified data and encoding.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcode.BarcodeSection``1(PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.String,``0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding,PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.Double,``0},IronBarCode.GeneratedBarcode)
member.summary: Creates a PDF section that renders a barcode using the specified data and encoding.
member.remarks: The barcode section supports dynamic data binding and customization through the callback. The height multiplier allows for flexible sizing of the barcode within the PDF layout.
member.typeparam: The type of the PDF model used for data binding within the section.
member.param: A binding action that provides the string data to encode in the barcode.
The encoding format to use for generating the barcode.
A binding action that specifies the height multiplier for the barcode, affecting its vertical scaling.
An optional callback invoked with the generated barcode, allowing for additional customization or processing.
member.returns: A PDF section configured to display a barcode based on the provided data and encoding.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcode.BarcodeSection``1(PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.String,``0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding,PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.Double,``0},IronBarCode.GeneratedBarcode)
member.summary: Creates a PDF section that renders a barcode using the specified data, encoding, and height multiplier.
member.typeparam: The type of the PDF model to which the barcode section is bound.
member.param: The property containing the string value to encode in the barcode. Cannot be null.
The barcode encoding format to use for rendering the barcode.
The property specifying the height multiplier for the barcode. Must be a positive value.
An optional callback that receives the generated barcode object for further customization or processing. If null, no callback is invoked.
member.returns: A PDF section instance that displays the barcode with the specified configuration.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcode.BarcodeSection``1(PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.String,``0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding,PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.Double,``0},PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.Double,``0},IronBarCode.GeneratedBarcode)
member.summary: Creates a PDF section that renders a barcode based on the specified model data and encoding.
member.remarks: Use this method to add barcode elements to a PDF document, with support for dynamic data binding and customization. The section can be integrated into larger PDF generation workflows.
member.typeparam: The type of the PDF model used to bind barcode data and properties.
member.param: A binding action that provides the string value to encode in the barcode from the model.
The barcode encoding format to use for rendering the barcode.
A binding action that determines the height multiplier for the barcode, allowing dynamic sizing based on the model.
A binding action that determines the width multiplier for the barcode, allowing dynamic sizing based on the model.
An optional callback that receives the generated barcode for further customization or processing.
member.returns: A PDF section that displays the barcode with the specified encoding and sizing, bound to the provided model data.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcode.BarcodeSection``1(PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.String,``0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding,PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.Double,``0},PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.Double,``0},IronBarCode.GeneratedBarcode)
member.summary: Creates a PDF section that renders a barcode using the specified data and encoding.
member.remarks: The barcode section supports customization of barcode size and encoding. The callback can be used to access the generated barcode for further processing or inspection.
member.typeparam: The type of the PDF model to which the barcode section is bound.
member.param: The property containing the string value to encode in the barcode. Cannot be null.
The barcode encoding format to use for rendering the barcode.
The property specifying the multiplier for the barcode's height. Must be positive.
The property specifying the multiplier for the barcode's width. Must be positive.
An optional callback invoked with the generated barcode object after rendering. If null, no callback is executed.
member.returns: A PDF section that displays the barcode with the specified data, encoding, and size multipliers.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring IronBarcode licensing within an ASP.NET Core dependency injection container.
member.remarks: This class enables the registration and configuration of IronBarcode license keys using the standard .NET dependency injection pattern. Use these methods to ensure IronBarcode is properly licensed before use in your application.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddIronBarcode(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the IronBarcode library with the specified license key for use within the application's dependency injection container.
member.remarks: This method sets the global license key for IronBarcode. It should be called during application startup before using IronBarcode services.
member.param: The service collection to which IronBarcode configuration will be applied.
The license key used to activate IronBarcode features. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: The same service collection instance, allowing for method chaining.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.BarcodeCreationCallback
member.summary: Represents a callback method that processes a generated barcode and returns a modified or new barcode instance.
member.param: The generated barcode to be processed by the callback. Cannot be null.
member.returns: A barcode instance resulting from the callback's processing. May be the original or a new barcode.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1
member.summary: Represents a PDF section that renders a barcode based on a bound property from the model.
member.remarks: Use PdfBarcodeSection to add a barcode to a PDF document, with customizable encoding and size. The barcode value is dynamically resolved from the model at render time. Height and width multipliers allow scaling of the barcode image. Optionally, a callback can be provided to access the generated barcode for further customization or processing.
member.typeparam: The type of the model used for binding barcode data and rendering properties. Must implement IPdfModel.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.#ctor(PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.String,`0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PdfBarcodeSection class with the specified data binding and barcode encoding.
member.param: The data binding action used to retrieve or set the barcode value from the model.
The encoding format to use for generating the barcode.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.#ctor(PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.String,`0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding,IronBarCode.GeneratedBarcode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PdfBarcodeSection class with the specified data binding, barcode encoding, and callback for generated barcodes.
member.param: The data binding action used to associate a string value with the model. Cannot be null.
The encoding format to use for generating the barcode. Determines how the barcode data is represented.
The callback to invoke when a barcode is generated. Used to handle the generated barcode result.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.#ctor(PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.String,`0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding,PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.Double,`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PdfBarcodeSection class with the specified data binding, barcode encoding, and height multiplier.
member.param: A binding action that provides the barcode data to be encoded. Cannot be null.
The encoding format to use for generating the barcode.
A binding that determines the vertical scaling factor for the barcode. Must be greater than zero.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.#ctor(PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.String,`0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding,PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.Double,`0},IronBarCode.GeneratedBarcode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PdfBarcodeSection class with the specified data binding, barcode encoding, height multiplier, and barcode generation callback.
member.param: A binding action that provides the data to be encoded in the barcode. Cannot be null.
The encoding format to use for generating the barcode.
A binding that determines the vertical scaling factor for the barcode. Must be a positive value.
A callback function that handles the generated barcode output. Cannot be null.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.#ctor(PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.String,`0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding,PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.Double,`0},PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.Double,`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PdfBarcodeSection class with the specified data binding, barcode encoding, height multiplier, and width multiplier.
member.param: A binding that provides the barcode data to be rendered. Cannot be null.
The encoding format to use for generating the barcode.
A binding that determines the vertical scaling factor for the barcode. Must be greater than zero.
A binding that determines the horizontal scaling factor for the barcode. Must be greater than zero.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.#ctor(PdfDocuments.BindPropertyAction{System.String,`0},IronBarCode.BarcodeEncoding,PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.Double,`0},PdfDocuments.BindProperty{System.Double,`0},IronBarCode.GeneratedBarcode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PdfBarcodeSection class with the specified data binding, barcode encoding, height multiplier, width multiplier, and barcode generation callback.
member.param: A binding action that provides the barcode data to be encoded. Cannot be null.
The encoding format to use for generating the barcode.
A binding that determines the vertical scaling factor for the barcode. Must be a positive value.
A binding that determines the horizontal scaling factor for the barcode. Must be a positive value.
A callback invoked when the barcode is generated. Used to handle the generated barcode result.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets the bound data value for the model.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.HeightMultiplier
member.summary: Gets or sets the multiplier applied to the height value for the model.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.WidthMultiplier
member.summary: Gets or sets the multiplier applied to the width calculation for the model.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.BarcodeEncoding
member.summary: Gets or sets the encoding scheme used for barcode generation and interpretation.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.Callback
member.summary: Gets or sets the generated barcode associated with the callback operation.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.IronBarcode.PdfBarcodeSection`1.OnRenderAsync(PdfDocuments.PdfGridPage,`0,PdfDocuments.PdfBounds)
member.summary: Renders a barcode image onto the specified PDF grid page using the provided model and bounds.
member.remarks: The barcode is generated and styled based on the resolved model and style parameters. The image is centered within the specified bounds. This method does not throw exceptions for rendering failures; instead, it returns if rendering is unsuccessful.
member.param: The PDF grid page on which the barcode image will be rendered.
The data model used to resolve barcode content and rendering parameters.
The bounds within the grid that define the area for rendering the barcode image.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous rendering operation. The result is if rendering succeeds; otherwise, .
